title: Noah Lucas homepage v017 static Serve image on white panel
changeSummary: Removes the Serve Robotics transparent animated WebP/GIF-style media from the live homepage release.
Removes the Serve Robotics media carousel second slide and dots so the section uses one static image.
Sets the full Serve Robotics media panel background to white in day and night modes.
Keeps the external-assets pointer contract; live Squarespace editor is not modified.
